summary: Maps Salesforce opportunity, account, and owner data into the canonical source_record used by Backstory pipeline and account workflows.

required_env.name: CRM_API_BASE_URL
required_env.description: Base URL for Salesforce or the customer API proxy.

required_env.name: CRM_CLIENT_ID
required_env.description: OAuth client or connected app ID for Salesforce.

mapping_files.purpose: Maps Salesforce opportunity, account, and owner fields into source_record and workflow_specific_fields.

fixtures.notes: Candidate account with credible pipeline signals and enough metadata for downstream scoring.

notes: Keep stage-name translation and owner fallback logic in the pack instead of the workflow.
Use this as the default CRM pack for account-update and opportunity-scoring families.
